Question Box

This is a simple question box template that generates an email draft to the instructor with the student's question. Students fill in their information and question, then click the button to open an email draft in their default email client (Outlook). Be sure to have your professor's email address on file, and that your browser is configured to open mailto links with your email client for this to work properly.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Ask Your Instructor

Fill in the form below to generate an email with your question.

Please note: Be sure to have your professor's email address on file, and that your browser is configured to open mailto links with your email client (Outlook).

Set up Outlook as default email client on Windows Set up Outlook as default email client on Mac Set up Outlook as default email client on ChromeOS

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:



        <section aria-label="Question Email Form"
  style="max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#202122;line-height:1.45;">

  <div style="border:1px solid #e6e6e6;border-radius:16px;padding:16px;background:#fff;">

    <header style="border-left:8px solid #cb4900;background:#fff7f0;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;">
      <h2 style="margin:0 0 4px 0;color:#cb4900;font-size:1.15rem;">
        Ask Your Instructor
      </h2>
      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.95rem;">
        Fill in the form below to generate an email with your question.
      </p>
    </header>

    <div style="margin-top:14px;display:grid;gap:12px;">

      <label>
        <span style="font-weight:700;">Instructor Email</span>
        <input id="instructorEmail" type="email"
          placeholder="vaquero.instructor@utrgv.edu"
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
      </label>

      <label>
        <span style="font-weight:700;">First Name</span>
        <input id="firstName" type="text" value="{FirstName}"
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
      </label>

      <label>
        <span style="font-weight:700;">Last Name</span>
        <input id="lastName" type="text" value="{LastName}"
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
      </label>

      <label>
        <span style="font-weight:700;">Student ID</span>
        <input id="studentID" type="text"
          placeholder="ex. 20123456"
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
      </label>

      <label>
        <span style="font-weight:700;">Course Name</span>
        <input id="courseName" type="text" value="{OrgUnitName}"
          placeholder="ex. UTRGV-1301-01-Spring-2024"
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;">
      </label>

      <label>
        <span style="font-weight:700;">Your Question</span>
        <textarea id="studentQuestion" rows="6"
          placeholder="Type your question here..."
          style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:12px;"></textarea>
      </label>

      <button id="emailBtn" type="button"
        style="cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #cb4900;background:#cb4900;color:#fff;
               padding:10px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-weight:700;width:fit-content;">
        Open Email Draft
      </button>

      <p style="margin:0;color:#4c4a4f;font-size:.85rem;">
        Please note: Be sure to have your professor's email address on file, 
          and that your browser is configured to open mailto links with your email client (Outlook).
      </p>

      <a href="https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/make-outlook-the-default-program-for-email-contacts-and-calendar-ff7990c4-54c4-4390-8fe3-c0285226f021"
        target="_blank" style="color:#cb4900;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">
        Set up Outlook as default email client on Windows
      </a>

      <a href="https://youtu.be/SLWQ2Ed3nyY?si=RA6Z8B-oqrAg1VBK"
        target="_blank" style="color:#cb4900;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">
        Set up Outlook as default email client on Mac
      </a>

      <a href="https://youtu.be/RCZwmx7-jWs?si=9PDcumi9GGmIcHTr"
        target="_blank" style="color:#cb4900;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;">
        Set up Outlook as default email client on ChromeOS
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

<script>
(function(){

const btn = document.getElementById("emailBtn");

btn.addEventListener("click", function(){

  const instructorEmail = document.getElementById("instructorEmail").value.trim();
  const firstName = document.getElementById("firstName").value.trim();
  const lastName = document.getElementById("lastName").value.trim();
  const studentID = document.getElementById("studentID").value.trim();
  const courseName = document.getElementById("courseName").value.trim();
  const question = document.getElementById("studentQuestion").value.trim();

  if(!instructorEmail){
    alert("Please enter the instructor email address.");
    return;
  }

         const subject =
          firstName + " " + lastName + " | " + courseName + " | Question";

        const body =
          "Hello Professor,\n\n" +
          "I have a question regarding " + courseName + ".\n\n" +
          "My question:\n" +
          question + "\n\n" +
          "Thank you,\n" +
          firstName + " " + lastName
           + "\nStudent ID#: " + studentID;

        const mailto =
          "mailto:" + instructorEmail +
          "?subject=" + encodeURIComponent(subject) +
          "&body=" + encodeURIComponent(body);

        window.location.href = mailto; 
});

})();
</script>

</section>

← Back to catalog
